title: Line 21300 – Universal child care benefit (UCCB) repayment - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 21300 – Universal child care benefit (UCCB) repayment
If you reported the universal child care benefit (UCCB) income in the previous year, you can claim the related 2025 repayment amount on line 21300 of your return.
The UCCB repayment amount is shown in box 12 of your RC62 slip .
To view your UCCB information, go to My Account .

## Forms and publications
- RC62 slip, Universal Child Care Benefit Statement
- Line 11700 – Universal child care benefit (UCCB)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
